title: Sneaky warning: 'could cause' instead of 'may cause' (flash-glare, level 8, tilt-left)
image_prompt: Photorealistic glass bottle with a woodgrain textured label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Maple Ridge', 'Bourbon Whiskey', '40% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Distilled and bottled by Ridge Distilling, Burlington, VT'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and could cause health problems.'
visualObservation: Visual note: label photo has severe flash glare over label text. Camera orientation is tilt-left (-15 degrees).
